panels.description: Requests, avg prompt/response length, and usage share per model

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN model_id = '' OR model_id IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE model_id END AS 'Model',
  COUNT(*) AS 'Requests',
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)), 1) AS 'Share %',
  ROUND(AVG(prompt_length)) AS 'Avg Prompt Len',
  ROUND(AVG(response_length)) AS 'Avg Response Len',
  ROUND(AVG(response_length) / NULLIF(AVG(prompt_length), 0), 2) AS 'Response/Prompt Ratio',
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_steering = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Steering Uses',
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_spec_mode = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Spec Mode Uses'
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY model_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: Model Performance Summary

panels.description: Request volume by model over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  CASE WHEN model_id = '' OR model_id IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE model_id END AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), model_id
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily Model Usage Distribution

panels.description: Average response length per model over time — proxy for output quality

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  CASE WHEN model_id = '' OR model_id IS NULL THEN '(unknown)' ELSE model_id END AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(response_length)) AS value
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), model_id
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Avg Response Length by Model (Daily)
